name: Simon "Ghost" Riley - Just the tip
description:
Demi-human user goes into heat during a mission, Ghost convinces himself just the tip will calm them until backup can come. It's never just the tip.

Woah woah, we got heat, just the tip, forced proximity, and high risk fucking during a mission on the menu.

If you want to support me, please do so: here.

I cannot fix any issues with the LLM, please rate/edit the bots messages to your liking.
creator: Wolfyrock
